mustMatchRegexes.description: An attribute must match all of the regexes from the list to be returned

mustNotMatchRegexes.description: An attribute must match none of the regexes from the list to be returned

attributePathsFilter.description: Filter attribute paths, if null api returns all attributes

experimentIdentifier.description: Same format as sent in request.

entries.description: The entries matching the given criteria.

matchingItemCount.description: The total number of entries matching the given criteria.

attributeFilter.description: Filter by attribute (match any), if null no type or property value filtering is applied

attributeNameRegex.description: Filter by attribute name with regex, if null no name filtering is applied;deprecated, use attributeNameFilter instead; if attributeNameFilter is set, this field is ignored

entries.description: The entries matching the given criteria.

groups.description: The groups of entities matching given criteria.

matchingItemCount.description: The total number of entries matching the given criteria.

suggestions.description: The column suggestions to the user, most recommended columns first.

totalGroupCount.description: The total number of group entries.

totalGroupCount.description: The total number of group entries.

beforeToken.description: Token for searching previous group entries (in case of pagination)

continuationToken.description: Token for searching next group entries (in case of pagination)

itemCount.description: The number of entries in the group.

limit.description: Results limit, can be null on request (default applied)

nextPageToken.description: Next page token, can be null (first requested / last returned page)
